description: Behavior evals check that when fired the skill: refuses if review is not approved, derives merge order from contracts (producers before consumers), surfaces contract cycles to the user, merges sequentially with per-merge build verification, reads baseline_branch from feature-state.json, and advances phase to cleanup.

cases.prompt: Merge the branches for PROJ-1234. feature-state.json shows review_approved: false. Services: order-service and payment-service.

Merge the branches for PROJ-1234. review_approved: true. Two services: payment-service (producer — exposes /api/payments endpoint) and order-service (consumer — calls /api/payments). Contracts are in features/PROJ-1234/contracts/order-to-payment.md. Describe the merge order you would compute.

Merge the branches for PROJ-3333. review_approved: true. Two services: svc-a and svc-b. Contracts show svc-a calls svc-b and svc-b calls svc-a — a bidirectional dependency. Describe what you do before merging anything.

Merge the branches for PROJ-5678. review_approved: true. Three services in order: payment-service, order-service, notification-service. After merging payment-service, the baseline build fails. Describe what you do before merging order-service.

must_not_contain_in_output: I will merge order-service next regardless

cases.prompt: Merge the branches for PROJ-9000. review_approved: true. feature-state.json contains baseline_branch: feature-2606-loyalty-discount. One service: order-service. Describe which branch you merge into.

Merge the branches for PROJ-2000. review_approved: true. One service: notification-service, merged successfully as commit abc1234. Describe the feature-state.json update you make after the merge completes.
